memoryArtifacts.description: Otto, Count of Ballenstedt, called Otto the Rich (c. 1070 – 9 February 1123), was the first Ascanian prince to call himself count of Anhalt, and was also briefly named duke of Saxony. He was the fathe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt於1070年出生在德國薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特時，他的父親Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt40歲，母親Adelaide von Weimar15歲。他於大約1094年與Eilika Billung von Sachsen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1123年2月9日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在德國安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 巴倫斯泰特巴倫斯泰特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt于1070年出生在德国薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特时，他的父亲Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt40岁，母亲Adelaide von Weimar15岁。他于大约1094年与Eilika Billung von Sachsen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1123年2月9日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在德国安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 巴倫斯泰特巴倫斯泰特。

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunter, Hans, Hermann, Juergen, Winfried.

variants.name: Reich
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, pronounced ‘reeth’, of uncertain derivation.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt was born in 1070, in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, his father, Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt, was 40 and his mother, Adelaide von Weimar, was 15. He married Eilika Billung von Sachsen about 1094. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 9 February 1123, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Ballenstedt, Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt est né en 1070, à Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, son père, Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Adelaide von Weimar, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Eilika Billung von Sachsen environ 1094. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 février 1123, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt 1070 in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt 40 und seine Mutter Adelaide von Weimar 15. Er hat um 1094 Eilika Billung von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Februar 1123 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt è nato il nel 1070 nel Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, il suo padre, Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide von Weimar, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Eilika Billung von Sachsen circa 1094. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 febbraio 1123, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedtが1070年にドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグボーレンステトで生まれた時，父Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedtは40歳，母Adelaide von Weimarは15歳であった。約1094年にEilika Billung von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1123年2月9日に故郷で53歳で死去し，ドイツアンハルトランドクレイス ボーレンステトボーレンステトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt(이)가 1070년 독일 작센-아할트 크들린버그 바렌스테드트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide von Weimar(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1094년 Eilika Billung von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1123년 2월 9일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 아할트 랜드크레이스 바렌스테드트 바렌스테드트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt nasceu em 1070, em Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide von Weimar, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Eilika Billung von Sachsen aproximadamente 1094. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1123, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt родился в 1070 г. в местности балленстедт, куедлинбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide von Weimar, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Eilika Billung von Sachsen около 1094 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 февраля 1123 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности балленстедт, ландкрис балленстедт, анэлт, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt nació en 1070, en Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, su papá, Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Adelaide von Weimar, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Eilika Billung von Sachsen aproximadamente 1094. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1123, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Alemania.
